question: List datasets that include attention in their title.
sql: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE d.name ILIKE '%attention%' GROUP BY d.id LIMIT 50

query_plan.natural_language_summary: List datasets that include 'attention' in their title.

augmented_question: List datasets that include 'attention' in their title.

question: Show me datasets with more than 20 male participants diagnosed with depression.
sql: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL JOIN bids_participants p ON p.dataset_id = d.id WHERE p.sex = 'male' AND p.diagnosis = 'depression' GROUP BY d.id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.participant_id) > 20 ORDER BY subject_count DESC LIMIT 50

query_plan.natural_language_summary: Find datasets containing more than 20 male participants diagnosed with depression.

augmented_question: Find datasets containing more than 20 male participants diagnosed with depression.

sql: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_objects bo WHERE bo.dataset_id = d.id AND bo.suffix = 'electrophysiology') GROUP BY d.id

query_plan.natural_language_summary: Find datasets that do not contain any electrophysiology recordings (such as EEG, MEG, or iEEG).

sql: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL JOIN bids_participants p ON p.dataset_id = d.id WHERE p.sex = 'female' AND p.diagnosis = 'parkinsons_disease' AND p.handedness = 'ambidextrous / mixed-handed' GROUP BY d.id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.participant_id) >= 10

sql: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_objects bo WHERE bo.dataset_id = d.id AND bo.datatype = 'pet') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_objects bo WHERE bo.dataset_id = d.id AND bo.suffix = 'MEG') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_objects bo WHERE bo.dataset_id = d.id AND bo.task = 'szMonitoring') GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY subject_count DESC LIMIT 50

question: Show me all datasets where the MRI manufacturer is listed as Siemens and participants have a smoking history.
sql: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL JOIN bids_participants p ON p.dataset_id = d.id WHERE o.other_entities->>'Manufacturer' = 'Siemens' AND p.extra->>'smoking' = 'yes' GROUP BY d.id

query_plan.natural_language_summary: Datasets featuring Siemens MRI scans and participants with a recorded smoking history.

augmented_question: Datasets featuring Siemens MRI scans and participants with a recorded smoking history.

question: Show me datasets where the average participant age is greater than 20 years.
sql: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL JOIN bids_participants p ON p.dataset_id = d.id GROUP BY d.id HAVING AVG(p.age) > 20

query_plan.natural_language_summary: Show datasets where the average participant age is greater than 20 years.

augmented_question: Show datasets where the average participant age is greater than 20 years.

question: Find datasets where the same subject has both magnetic resonance spectroscopy data and performed the video game and video task.
sql: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_objects o1 WHERE o1.dataset_id = d.id AND o1.datatype = 'magnetic_resonance_spectroscopy' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_objects o2 WHERE o2.dataset_id = d.id AND o2.subject = o1.subject AND o2.task = 'video_game_and_video')) GROUP BY d.id

query_plan.natural_language_summary: Find datasets where the same subject has magnetic resonance spectroscopy data and has performed both the video game and video tasks.

augmented_question: Find datasets where the same subject has magnetic resonance spectroscopy data and has performed both the video game and video tasks.

question: Identify datasets where female participants outnumber male participants by at least 5 subjects.
sql: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL LEFT JOIN bids_participants p ON p.dataset_id = d.id GROUP BY d.id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.participant_id) FILTER (WHERE p.sex = 'female') >= COUNT(DISTINCT p.participant_id) FILTER (WHERE p.sex = 'male') + 5 LIMIT 50

query_plan.natural_language_summary: Identify datasets where the number of female participants is at least 5 greater than the number of male participants.

augmented_question: Identify datasets where the number of female participants is at least 5 greater than the number of male participants.

question: List all datasets that do not have a registered DOI.
sql: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE d.doi IS NULL GROUP BY d.id LIMIT 50

query_plan.natural_language_summary: List all datasets that do not have a registered DOI.

augmented_question: List all datasets that do not have a registered DOI.

question: Which 5 datasets mention attention in their name or description but have no associated files?
sql: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE (d.name ILIKE '%attention%' OR d.description_text ILIKE '%attention%') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bids_objects bo WHERE bo.dataset_id = d.id) GROUP BY d.id LIMIT 5

query_plan.natural_language_summary: Find 5 datasets that mention 'attention' in their name or description but have no associated files in the bids_objects table.

augmented_question: Find 5 datasets that mention 'attention' in their name or description but have no associated files in the bids_objects table.

question: Show the top 25 datasets involving male, ambidextrous participants categorized as healthy control task variants.
sql: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL JOIN bids_participants p ON p.dataset_id = d.id WHERE p.diagnosis = 'healthy_control_task_variant' AND p.sex = 'male' AND p.handedness = 'ambidextrous / mixed-handed' GROUP BY d.id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.participant_id) >= 25 LIMIT 50

query_plan.natural_language_summary: Show the top 25 datasets featuring male, ambidextrous participants who are healthy controls.

augmented_question: Show the top 25 datasets featuring male, ambidextrous participants who are healthy controls.

question: Which datasets include longitudinal data with at least 4 sessions?
sql: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.session) >= 4 LIMIT 50

query_plan.natural_language_summary: Find datasets with longitudinal data where subjects have at least 4 sessions.

question: Find datasets authored by Joanes Grandjean.
sql: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE 'Joanes Grandjean' = ANY(d.authors) GROUP BY d.id

question: Which studies have collected longitudinal data with 4 or more visits for their participants?
sql: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.session) >= 4 LIMIT 50

query_plan.natural_language_summary: Find datasets where participants have 4 or more sessions (longitudinal visits).

question: Show me datasets that have a CC0 license agreement.
sql: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.accession_id, d.bids_version, d.dataset_type, d.source_type, d.remote_url, d.validation_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.subject) AS subject_count FROM bids_datasets d LEFT JOIN bids_objects o ON o.dataset_id = d.id AND o.subject IS NOT NULL WHERE d.license = 'CC0' OR d.license = 'Creative Commons CC0 1.0' GROUP BY d.id

query_plan.natural_language_summary: Show datasets that have a CC0 license agreement.

question: List all datasets provided under a CCO license.
